channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rare Rehearsal Photos Highlight Rowan Atkinson’s Early Comedy Work on “Not the Nine O’Clock News”
item.description: The article looks back at Rowan Atkinson’s early television career through a collection of behind-the-scenes rehearsal photographs from the British sketch comedy series “Not the Nine O’Clock News,” wh...

item.title: George Russell claims Canadian Grand Prix sprint victory after tense battle with teammate Kimi Antonelli
item.description: George Russell secured victory in the Canadian Grand Prix sprint race at Montreal’s Circuit Gilles Villeneuve after starting from pole position for Mercedes. The British driver controlled the race ove...

item.title: Neil Young performs first live show of 2026 at Vancouver benefit concert featuring ‘Heart Of Gold’ and ‘After The Gold Rush’
item.description: Neil Young made an unexpected return to the stage for his first live performance of 2026, appearing at a benefit concert in Vancouver dedicated to Canadian environmentalist David Suzuki’s 90th birthda...

item.title: Ro Khanna Criticizes Trump After AI-Generated Social Media Attack
item.description: Representative Ro Khanna, a Democrat from California, publicly responded to a social media attack launched by President Donald Trump on Saturday. Trump used his Truth Social platform to post an insult...

item.title: Kenya Met issues 24-hour weather outlook warning of rainfall, thunderstorms and strong winds across multiple counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has released a 24-hour weather outlook covering conditions from Saturday night through Sunday, May 24, warning of varied weather patterns across different regions o...

item.title: Ebola treatment facility attacked in eastern Congo, allowing 18 suspected cases to escape
item.description: An Ebola treatment tent in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo was set on fire again, according to an Associated Press report updated on May 23, 2026. The incident led to the escape of 18 individ...

item.title: Finding Emily review: Romantic comedy explores obsession and manipulation on a university campus
item.description: Film critic Ron Cerabona reviews Finding Emily, a romantic comedy directed by Alicia MacDonald and written by Rachel Hirons, arguing that the movie struggles to balance romance with behaviour that bor...

item.title: Zara Larsson reflects on career resurgence, controversies and upcoming Radio 1 Big Weekend headline set
item.description: Zara Larsson has spoken about her return to major pop prominence after what she has previously described as a difficult or ‘flop’ period in her career. The Swedish singer, now 28, rose to internationa...

item.title: Study Shows Vitamin D2 Supplements May Reduce Beneficial Vitamin D3 Levels
item.description: A new study from the University of Surrey, in collaboration with the John Innes Centre and Quadram Institute Bioscience, has raised concerns about vitamin D2 supplements. Researchers found that taking...

item.title: YSpeak 2.0 discusses whether spreading false information should be criminalized
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios’ program YSpeak 2.0 featured a discussion tackling one of today’s most pressing digital-age issues: whether spreading false information should be treated as a crime. The episode brings...

item.title: Oba Akiolu Recounts Rejecting ₦5 Million Gift During Abacha Era While Assisting Michael Otedola

item.title: John Kasich declines endorsement in Ohio Senate race, predicts close contest between Husted and Brown
item.description: Former Ohio Republican Governor John Kasich declined to endorse Senator Jon Husted in his reelection bid during a recent appearance on MS NOW’s ‘The Weekend,’ offering a cautious and noncommittal view...

item.title: Amosun says APC united behind Tinubu’s 2027 re-election bid
item.description: Former Governor of Ogun State, Ibikunle Amosun, has publicly reaffirmed strong support for President Bola Tinubu ahead of the 2027 general elections, stating that members of the All Progressives Congr...

item.title: Study finds healthy and widespread population of fishing cats in Kaziranga floodplains
item.description: A recent scientific survey has found that fishing cats (Prionailurus viverrinus) are thriving across the floodplains of Kaziranga National Park and Tiger Reserve in Assam. The first comprehensive surv...

item.title: Pauline Hanson says One Nation will contest all WA federal seats ahead of the 2028 election
item.description: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson has announced that her party plans to contest all 16 federal Lower House seats in Western Australia at the 2028 federal election, along with Senate positions. Hanson s...

item.title: Sandra Bullock Helped Demonstrate One of the First Online Movie Ticket Purchases in 1995
item.description: In 1995, actress Sandra Bullock participated in what became an important early moment in the history of online commerce when she purchased movie tickets over the internet to promote her thriller film ...

item.title: Githurai residents recover missing baby after suspect reveals location
item.description: Residents of Githurai 45 in Nairobi were left shaken after a two-year-old child went missing following a suspected abduction captured on CCTV footage. The video, which went viral, showed a young girl ...

item.title: UN raises concern over rising food insecurity and malnutrition affecting millions of Nigerians
item.description: The United Nations don raise serious concern over the growing food insecurity situation for Nigeria, warning say about 35 million people fit face acute hunger between June and August 2026. According t...

item.title: Ebola treatment centres attacked in eastern DR Congo as patients flee amid unrest
item.description: Health authorities in the Democratic Republic of Congo are dealing with a worsening Ebola outbreak after two treatment facilities in the eastern Ituri province were attacked within the space of a week...

item.title: Canadian government spending on King Charles III’s 2025 throne speech visit estimated at nearly $900,000
item.description: The article reports that the estimated cost of bringing King Charles III to Canada to deliver the Speech from the Throne in the Senate chamber was close to $900,000. The visit, which took place at the...
